name: Contacts
description: Full-featured Address Book plugin for Hecos. Stores contacts with rich metadata (multi-value phones/emails/socials, photo, birthday, tags, label color). Exposes LLM tools, REST API, vCard import/export, and WhatsApp integration.

commands.find_contact: Finds a contact by name, phone, email or tag.
commands.update_contact: Updates fields of an existing contact.
commands.delete_contact: Deletes a contact by name or ID.
commands.list_contacts: Lists contacts, optionally filtered by tag or query.
commands.send_whatsapp_to_contact: Sends a WhatsApp message to a contact via the Messenger plugin.

function.name: CONTACTS__find_contact
function.description: Searches the address book and returns matching contacts. Use when the user asks 'chi è X?', 'find the number of Y', 'qual è il telefono di Z', 'cerca il contatto', 'who is...'.

query.description: Name, phone number, email, company or tag to search for.

function.name: CONTACTS__add_contact
function.description: Creates a new contact in the address book. Use when the user says 'aggiungi contatto', 'salva questo numero', 'add a contact', 'registra il numero di X'.

display_name.description: Optional custom display name. Defaults to 'First Last'.

birthday.description: Birthday in natural language or ISO format (e.g. '15 marzo 1990', '1990-03-15').

label_color.description: Hex color for the contact label (e.g. '#3498db').

function.name: CONTACTS__update_contact
function.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing contact. Use when the user says 'aggiorna il contatto X', 'cambia il numero di Y', 'update contact'.

id_or_name.description: Contact ID (UUID or prefix) or display name to identify the contact.

function.name: CONTACTS__delete_contact
function.description: Permanently deletes a contact from the address book. Use when the user says 'elimina il contatto X', 'rimuovi X dalla rubrica', 'delete contact'.

id_or_name.description: Contact ID or display name to delete.

function.name: CONTACTS__list_contacts
function.description: Returns a formatted list of all contacts, optionally filtered. Use when the user says 'mostrami la rubrica', 'lista contatti', 'show all contacts', 'chi ho in rubrica'.

limit.description: Max number of contacts to return. Default: 20.

function.name: CONTACTS__send_whatsapp_to_contact
function.description: Sends a WhatsApp message to a contact using the Messenger plugin. Use when the user says 'manda un messaggio WhatsApp a X', 'scrivi a X su WhatsApp', 'send WhatsApp to contact'.

name.description: Contact name or display name to look up the WhatsApp number.
